person.name: Henry Fulford II
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Henry de Fulford II was born in 1390 at Great Fulford, Devonshire, England. He was the son of Sir Henry Fulford. Henry de Fulford II married Wilhelma (Willmot) Brian, daughter of Phillip Brian around 1513 in Devonshire, England. They had at least one son: Baldwin Fulford, born ca. 1515 in Great Fulford, Devonshire, England. He was later knighted and became Sheriff of Devonshire. He was a prominent Lancaster-supporter (Henry IV) during England's War of the Roses.

Henry de Fulford died in April 1420 at Great Fulford, Co. Devon, England. His wife had passed away about 1417 at their home in Devonshire, England.

nameMeanings.name: Fulford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named in Devon, such as Fulford in Tiverton, Great Fulford in Dunsford, Fullaford in High Bray, Fulford Bridge in Shebbear, Fullaford in Sampford Courtenay, and Fullaford in Buckfastleigh.

habitational name from one or more of the various places so called elsewhere in England, such as Fulford (Staffordshire), Fulford in Kingston Saint Mary (Somerset), Gate Fulford and Water Fulford (both East Yorkshire), Fulfords Farm in Itchingfield (Sussex), and Fulforth in Witton Gilbert (Durham). All places in 1 above and 2 are named from Old English fūl ‘dirty, muddy’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Fulford II was born in 1390, in Great Fulford, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Fulford, was 50 and his mother, Catherine Fitzurse, was 49. He married Wilmot Brian in 1396, in Devon, England. He died about April 1420, in his hometown, at the age of 30.

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Fulford II(이)가 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 그리트 프퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Fulford(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Fitzurse(은)는 49세였다. 그는 1396년 영국 데폰에서 Wilmot Brian(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 대략 1420년 4월 그의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Fulford II родился в 1390 г. в местности грит фьулфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Fulford было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Fitzurse, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Wilmot Brian в 1396 г. в местности девон, Англия. Он умер около апрель 1420 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 30 лет.
